brevity.rationale: NarasiGhaisan Section 13 communication style, enforced at data layer in apollo.ts plus prompt layer in apollo.prompts.ts.

turn_budget.rationale: Short-turn Advisor style bounds token burn per NarasiGhaisan Section 4 Tokopedia-tier cost awareness.

routing_rules.rationale: Builder is hero pillar per CLAUDE.md locked decisions; fanout up to three pillars enables cross-pillar flows like build + listing + billing in one user turn; reject surfaces as system turn with no automatic retry to avoid token waste on deterministic failure.

opus_all.description_en: Premium tier, Opus across every agent.
opus_all.description_id: Tier premium, Opus di setiap agent.

collaborative.description_en: Opus for strategic agents, Sonnet for execution workers.
collaborative.description_id: Opus buat agent strategis, Sonnet buat worker eksekusi.

multi_vendor.honest_claim_annotation: Demo execution Anthropic only, multi-vendor unlock post-hackathon.
multi_vendor.description_en: User picks per-task vendor (Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield, others).
multi_vendor.description_id: User pilih vendor per-task (Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield, dll).

auto.honest_claim_annotation: Auto routing ships post-hackathon; current demo uses collaborative Anthropic.
auto.description_en: Orchestrator researches and decides per-task model.
auto.description_id: Orchestrator riset dan pilih model per-task.

prediction_warning.rationale: Threshold 0.6 matches prediction_layer_surface.contract.md band boundary (medium-to-low); building_floor variant proposed by Apollo, pending Ghaisan voice sign-off per docs/apollo.decisions.md ADR-0003.

world_aesthetic.rationale: Default cyberpunk_shanghai matches Ghaisan's most-referenced aesthetic (NERIUMcyberpunkcity.html reference). Steampunk_victorian is V2 proposal pending explicit Ghaisan confirm per NarasiGhaisan Section 7.

intent_parser.rationale: Keyword heuristic first for cost; Opus assist optional post-hackathon or on request via injected UserIntentParser per apollo.ts AdvisorAgentDeps.

event_bus.rationale: Apollo owns advisor.* namespace and consumes pipeline.* for cross-pillar awareness; cross-pillar namespaces (marketplace.*, banking.*, registry.*, protocol.*) are observed on an as-needed basis per each pillar contract.

blueprint_moment.rationale: Locked 1:30 to 2:10 of the 3-minute demo per apollo.md context and blueprint_moment.contract.md handoff.
